name: the-art-of-thinking-clearly
description: Rolf Dobelli's The Art of Thinking Clearly — field guide to 99+ cognitive biases that lead to bad decisions
useCase: Helps users recognize cognitive biases, make better decisions, evaluate risk correctly, and overcome self-deception.
knownRisks: Awareness of biases doesn't automatically prevent them — practice and systems are required
Some biases overlap; classification may vary between sources
